title: max's smp pack
description: Perfect for SMPs—optimized FPS, smoother visuals, and tools that make PvP, building, and adventuring more fun. (Currently in release 26.1)
body:
max's smp pack

A lightweight, performance-focused Fabric modpack for smoother multiplayer gameplay, cleaner visuals, and a better overall Minecraft experience.
Compatible with Fabric 1.21.11 and below, including Lunar and other Fabric-based clients.

⸻

Overview

This pack improves FPS, visual clarity, and quality-of-life while keeping Minecraft’s vanilla feel.
It combines core optimizers like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore with useful client-side mods such as Simple Voice Chat, and Armor HUD—resulting in faster loading, smoother gameplay, and a clean UI for SMPs.

⸻

⚡ Features

- Performance: Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore
- Visuals: Iris Shaders, Miniature Shader (low FPS impact), ScalableLux, Status Effect Bars
- QoL: Armor HUD, EntityCulling, BadOptimizations

Great for PvP, building, and long SMP sessions.

⸻

Installation

Fabric (Vanilla):
1.	Install Fabric Loader
2.	Run once to generate the mods/ folder
3.	Download the .mrpack
4.  Convert! https://mrpackzip.com/
4.	Go into folder and go to the mods tab
5.	Copy .jar files into .minecraft/mods/ → launch ✅

Fabric Clients (Feather, etc.):
1.	Enable Fabric Loader
2.	Download MaxSMPPack-mods.zip
3.	Copy .jar files into the client’s mods/ folder
4.	Restart the client

(Also in Lunar Client you can just download the whole modpack on the modpack page)

⸻

🧠 Why Use This Pack?

Designed for players who want better performance without breaking vanilla gameplay.
No extra mechanics or clutter—just smoother FPS, cleaner visuals, and reliable client-side tools.

Perfect for:
- SMP players
- Builders
- Content creators

⸻

💡 FAQ

Q: Is this client-side?
Yes — safe for vanilla and Fabric servers.

Q: Is it allowed on big servers?
Usually yes, but always check server rules.

Q: Low FPS with shaders?
Disable shaders or use Miniature Shader.

Q: Crashed on launch?
Use Fabric 1.21.11+, latest loader, and Modrinth App or Prism Launcher.

Q: Will it be updated?
Yes — regularly, alongside Fabric and Minecraft updates.

⸻

Thank you for downloading!
I’m actively improving this pack and really appreciate the support ❤️
